name: send-email
author: hagency
description: Send emails via SMTP or Feishu/Lark Mail API

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email to a recipient. Supports plain text and optional HTML body. Uses SMTP or Feishu/Lark as the delivery backend.

body.description: Email body content. Plain text by default, or HTML if the html flag is set to true.

provider.description: Email provider to use. If omitted, auto-detected from environment variables (SMTP_HOST for SMTP, LARK_APP_ID for Feishu).

html.description: When true, treat the body as HTML content. Default is false (plain text).

attachments.description: File attachments to include (SMTP only). Each item specifies a file path and optional display name.

path.description: Absolute file path to the attachment

name.description: Display name for the attachment (defaults to the file name)
